steps.assistant_text: Phase A of Run 2 sweep. Stores function pointer into a USO data slot. Required adding D_00000030 = 0x30 to undefined_syms_auto.txt since splat referred to the slot as 'func_00000008 + 0x28' instead of a named data symbol.

metadata.verification: Verified with objdiff; fuzzy_match_percent=100.0. -O0 leaf function storing &func_00000000 to a USO data global (D_00000030).
